basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Project Associate II Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website nitrr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Raipur Project Associate II Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Power System/ Energy System or relevant specialization with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) and two years' experience in R&D/industry/academic institutes are eligible to apply for this Project Associate II vacancy. The email a

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details on age limits and any applicable relaxations.

qualification.details: Project Associate-II (PA-II): M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Power System/ Energy System or relevant specialization with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) from a recognized University or equivalent, and two years' experience in R&D/industry/academic institutes.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-II (PA-II): Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur Project Associate-II (PA-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Raipur Project Associate-II (PA-II) recruitment is 20-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II (PA-II) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering or a related specialization with at least 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA, along with two years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II (PA-II) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate-II (PA-II) post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITRR/EED/2026/4520.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job, as indicated by the 'Job Type' as 'Contract'.
